story.text: *Unnamed* — one of the open frontier, the **Quest of the Unnamed Faces**. This vertex has not yet been forged. Fork the repo, forge it at [spellweb.ai](https://spellweb.ai), and name what you find when you walk this configuration.

## On the lattice

- **Complement** (bnot = 63 − 20 = 43): [[Artefact 43 — Unnamed]] — everything this blade is not.
- **Successor** (the dihedral walk `neg(bnot(x)) = succ(x)`): [[Artefact 21 — The Prover]].
- Forged in [[The Workshops]] — each shop instances one or more of these six dimensions at its vertex.
